chunks.text: Course: CS 199 | EECS at UC Berkeley CS 199. Supervised Independent Study Catalog Description: Supervised independent study. Enrollment restrictions apply. Units: 1-4 Also Offered As: COMPSCI 199 Prerequisites: Consent of instructor and major adviser.
